title: Casa Grande is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Casa Grande is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Casa Grande. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Property Advisor to strengthen our Agra-based team.

About Casa Grande:
Casa Grande is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Casa Grande!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
